title: Pinjula Pinjula Song Lyrics From Simba
stanzas:
Pinjula pinjula
manam vedhumbi
thavikuthada lifeu.
nenjula ulla
manjaa soru
edukkuthada loveu.(2)

daavadicha ponnu ippo
dive-u adichitaa
kadhale venaamunu
kaiyya virichitaa

thaaya katta pol irundhaale
ondi katta aakkiputaale
ondi katta aakkiputaale

Sondham bandham odhungi pochu
kanna muzhi pidhungi pochu
aadhavaraa anaichikathaan
yaarum illa maamu.

niyaabaga azhukai ellaam
thuvachida manasukoru
soapa yaarum idhuvaraikkum
kandupudikkala maamu

dhamaa thundu nenju
adhu nenje illa panju
theeya vachi poyitaale
thirumu pudicha vanji.

thanimayil manasukulla
karaiyiraan ivane
ondi katta aakkiputaale
ondi katta aakkiputaale

andhuruchu dangu vaaru
ava manam thaarumaaru
sandhu pondhu indhu
idukkil sandhosame ledhu

rendu kattaan vayasulathaan
thundu thundaa aakkiputta
gundu katta thookki poatu
kumuruthaiyaa soodhu

kattam katti vachi
ivana velukkathaiyaa machi
kaalam pannum kolam
romba kodumaiyada machi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pinjula Pinjula?

The song expresses the playful and joyous feelings of love, highlighting the excitement and emotions that come with it.

What is the context of this song in the movie Simba?

This song is featured in a romantic setting, showcasing the lead characters' chemistry and their journey of love.

Who is the singer of Pinjula Pinjula?

The song is sung by Simbu, who brings a lively energy to the track.

Who composed the music for Simba?

The music for the movie is composed by Vishal Chandrasekar, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was Pinjula Pinjula released?

The song was released on March 9, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pinjula Pinjula, the vibrant energy of love is beautifully captured through playful lyrics and an upbeat melody. The song showcases the excitement and joy of young romance, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. As the characters navigate their feelings, the infectious rhythm invites listeners to join in the fun. This track not only highlights the chemistry between the leads but also evokes a sense of nostalgia for carefree love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pinjula Pinjula from Simba is a vibrant celebration of love that captures the essence of youthful romance. With Simbu's captivating vocals and Vishal Chandrasekar's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you dancing. Dive into the playful lyrics and feel the energy that makes this song a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Life is like a pinjula (a type of bird), it feels like love is taking away the joy from the heart.
The girl who was carefree is now diving into the depths, saying she doesn't want love anymore.
If a mother is strong, she can turn a child into something great.
Relationships and bonds have broken, and no one is left to care anymore.
All the tears and sadness have been wiped away, but no one has noticed until now.
The heart is like a cloth that has been torn, and no one has recognized this pain until now.
The heart is heavy, and it feels like it has been thrown away like a useless thing.
In solitude, he is lost in his thoughts, and he can be shaped into something great.
When she comes, her heart brings joy, but there is no happiness in this situation.
Two people are of the same age, but they are now just a burden to each other, feeling trapped.
He is tied down, and it feels like he is stuck in a difficult situation.
God does not give him anything at all.
Tears are still yet to fall from his eyes.
